title: Pre-release access list: Reports of cases of TB to UK enhanced tuberculosis surveillance systems 2000 to 2024
body: "To ensure that appropriate individuals are able to respond to questions arising from information in our official statistics releases, we give them access to documents 24 hours before publication on GOV.UK. In doing this we follow the rules and principles set out in the Pre-release Access to Official Statistics Order 2008.  For more information, see our policy on pre-release access.  The lists on this page show the individuals who have been given pre-release access to the annual Tuberculosis statistics, England. "
